# Project Instructions

All project conventions, workflow protocols, and coding rules for this repository are defined in **[CLAUDE.md](../CLAUDE.md)** at the repository root.

Please read and follow it—it applies equally to both Claude Code CLI and VS Code Copilot.

Additional files to consult when relevant:
- `.claude/rules/web.md` — rules auto-loaded for `projectType: web`
- `.claude/rules/game-engine.md` — rules auto-loaded for `projectType: game-engine`
- `spec.md` — current project specification and constraints (if present)
- `progress.json` — current task progress (if present)
